tool_args.label: Joint MNR and LIRR Committee Meeting - October 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Joint Metro-North and Long Island Committees Meeting October 2021 - Monday, 10/18/2021 9:30 - 10:30 AM ET

payload.event_name: Joint Metro-North and Long Island Committees Meeting
payload.description: Joint meeting of the Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road Committees held at 2 Broadway, 20th floor Board Room, New York, NY on Monday, 10/18/2021.

tool_args.label: Metro-North Committee Meeting - September 13, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Minutes of the Regular Meeting Metro-North Committee Monday, September 13, 2021

payload.description: Regular meeting of the Metro-North Committee, held jointly with the LIRR Committee at 2 Broadway, New York, NY.

tool_args.label: Tropical Storm Henri impacts Metro-North - August 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Tropical Storm Henri impacted Metro-North's operations on Sunday, August 22, 2021

payload.description: Tropical Storm Henri prompted suspension of New Haven Line service and curtailment of Harlem and Hudson Line service by Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Hurricane Ida remnants - September 1-2, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: remnants of Hurricane Ida unleashed record-setting rains during the overnight of September 1st to 2nd and disrupted service for days

payload.description: Remnants of Hurricane Ida caused record-setting rains, severe flooding, and extensive service disruptions across Metro-North and LIRR territory.

tool_args.label: MNR average daily ridership - 112,468
tool_args.raw_text: On the four workdays last week, Metro-North calculated an average daily ridership of 112,468

tool_args.label: MNR ridership 42.8% of pre-COVID baseline
tool_args.raw_text: This is 42.8% of pre-COVID base ridership and 39% of the average weekday ridership in September of 2019

payload.metric_name: ridership as percent of pre-COVID baseline

tool_args.raw_text: Total ridership increased +77.8% compared to September 2020 (3,630,469 passengers in September 2021 vs. 2,041,823 passengers in September 2020)

tool_args.label: LIRR mask usage 92% on September 8, 2021
tool_args.raw_text: Our recent survey on September 8th showed proper mask usage back up to 92%, from the 87% we observed on August 12th

tool_args.raw_text: The LIRR fleet MDBF operated 337,790 in August and exceeded the goal

tool_args.label: MNR new schedule August 29 with service at 82% of pre-pandemic
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North planned and implemented a new schedule on Sunday, August 29th with service increasing to 82% of pre-pandemic levels and weekend service returning to full pre-pandemic levels.

payload.claim_text: Metro-North implemented a new schedule on August 29, 2021 with service increasing to 82% of pre-pandemic levels and weekend service returning to full pre-pandemic levels.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad

tool_args.label: Off-peak fares extended through end of year
tool_args.raw_text: off-peak fares on the Long Island Rail Road and Metro-North will remain in effect through the end of the year

payload.claim_text: Off-peak fares on LIRR and Metro-North will remain in effect through the end of the year.
payload.subject: Metro-North Railroad and Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Port Washington Branch first branch with full concrete ties
tool_args.raw_text: On August 29th, we completed making the Port Washington Branch our first branch with full concrete ties.

payload.claim_text: LIRR completed making the Port Washington Branch the first branch with full concrete ties on August 29, 2021.
payload.subject: Long Island Rail Road

tool_args.label: Harrison Station Parking Garage
tool_args.raw_text: opening of the new, almost 600 space parking garage at the Harrison Station

payload.description: New almost 600-space parking garage at Harrison Station, with 475 spaces reserved for Metro-North customers, representing an 80% increase in available parking for riders. Completed at no capital cost to MTA or Metro-North.

tool_args.label: Breakneck Ridge Trail Land Disposition
tool_args.raw_text: Disposition of land to New York State Department of Parks, Recreation & Historic Preservation at Breakneck Ridge hiking trailhead on Metro-North's Hudson Line at milepost 54.6

payload.description: Authorization to convey fee simple title of 2.41 acres to New York State Parks for use as a public hiking trail, subject to reservation of a permanent easement for railroad operations. Appraised value $80,000, conveyed as donation.

tool_args.label: Bike Storage Pilot at Grand Central Terminal
tool_args.raw_text: BIKE STORAGE PILOT PERMIT AT GRAND CENTRAL TERMINAL

payload.project_name: Bike Storage Pilot at Grand Central Terminal
payload.description: One-year pilot license for Modular Streetscape Systems Inc to install, operate and maintain a bike mini pod for bike storage at the northern corner of the former Grand Central Terminal Vanderbilt Avenue taxiway. Accommodates 6 bicycles.

tool_args.label: Cherry Valley Avenue Bridge Replacement
tool_args.raw_text: removal and replacement of the Cherry Valley Avenue Bridge located in Garden City on the Long Island Railroad's Hempstead Branch

payload.project_name: Cherry Valley Avenue Bridge Removal and Replacement
payload.description: Competitively solicited and negotiated design-build contract for removal and replacement of the Cherry Valley Avenue Bridge in Garden City on LIRR's Hempstead Branch. Total $16,663,538.40.
